reviews.review_description:
Once, again we have a VR coaster that looks like it was developed by someone who has never been on a roller coaster. The sample coaster is very bare-bones, and features low poly graphics, not so good physics and a really strange layout.  Surrounding the environment is a blurry backdrop that looks incredibly out of place.  The few other attractions are locked and can be purchased, but why, when the free, flagship  ride isn’t good? The coaster is always the heart of an amusement park. 
Well, it appears to be still in development so hopefully it will get a major overhaul.
I can never find an extreme enough vr roller coaster.

Neh...it' alright maybe, but just sampling the coaster isn't sufficient for me to want to buy more. Since there's lots of coaster games available already, why not promote your game with a different ride? Relix or Coaster Battles puts this to shame, but you're on the right track for dynamics. Add some scenery like trees, bushes, flowers, other riders, etc. and it'll be much more enjoyable. If you can toss in some animation even if it was a freakin' fly in my face, that'd add tremendous value to an experience like this.

I have to agree with the first reviewer who said that while there are some positives of this game, not really a polished, top-flight experience. Having a blurred background environment is really bad for immersion, and I don't think it helps with the already very high intensity of the initial free ride. I do like that they've gone a different direction with this coaster and made it more of a quick-turn coaster rather than a million mph, although some turns are banked too sharply and I also got some stutter on my S7. These developers obviously possess the skills to do something very intriguing, so it seems a bit cheap when much more basic apps like happy world land have an entire free-form park you can walk around, and this one doesn't even have clean background environments. It's a start, but updates sorely needed
This game looks like "it was made under 5 minutes". it should be an alpha version.
Basic experiences you can get for free elsewhere
It only let's you play one game but you HAVE TO PAY TO PLAY THE OTHER ONES
